message.body: poop_bike is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: k3 first playthru final boss
is this Stream Starting screen new or have I just never saw it before
the phases in this are like their own fight essentially so categories is probably fine
and you're mostly in phase 2 anyway
yeah they removed the final maze in 2.0 for whatever reason
i love the moons attack here, its epic how you have shooting moons that fall and explode on the ground to shoot out more bullets
Kamilia phase 1 but every moon is the Influka area moon boss
yeah you got past tge start and darkness
it is one of the infamous attacks of Kamilia
you make any progress on m-stage?
i didnt even start the boss
everytime i beat something in that game i dont want to play it anymore
until one day i randomly boot it up again
im just not into fangames anymore
ill be patiently waiting for the ninja gaiden playthroughs
you can start with sigma 1 in the master collection on steam
but dont play sigma 2 its not real
when it comes to ng2, the only true ng2 experience is the og xbox 360 release
sigma 2 is the ps3 version of ng2
and they butchered the game in that version
for ng1, sigma 1 is a fine version, i probably prefer it
sigma 1 is fine, sigma 2 is bad
and the new "ninja gaiden 2 black" remake is based on sigma 2 unfortunately
they did a half-assed job trying to make it a little more like the original but its not
sigma 2 isnt a remake, its a ps3 port with major balance changes, removed gore, ect
no sins of the father/ or last hope  one of those
because the ps3 is a weak console, it couldnt handle ng2s true form
The Terrible Tower is original slayer tower
to be fair the 360 could barely handle it either
i have like 1500 hours in The Terrible Tower
so the other two just naturally bang
basically, it was originally designed for 360, they ported it to ps3 later and had to make compromises
so i just heard it like most of my OSRS career
prolly but cant change it so
it was mostly gargoyles i think i hear this song too
because im remembering slaying 3000 nechyreals by hand
all you need to know is when it comes to ng2, play the original xbox version, its the only true version
i thought sailing was a joke
ng1 was an xbox game, ng2 was a 360 game
idk what ur talking about sailing isnt in the game
i keep making the mistake of saying "original xbox" and making you think im talking about the first xbox
what i mean is original xbox 360 version
did u fix ur sound addon
oh i guess it doesnt exist in this version
IDR what song is north of edgeville
its at the zammy guy i think
its somewhere else too but i remember it only as north of edgeville
I get drunk as fack blazed up and put on this on my headphones
Its the melody how it bounces, up and down
its like ur going thru a forest
when its that very part of that song playing
Like this part its so fucking sick
The drummy part is GWD, but then it splits into like graceful forest journey
but no were due Gnome city tbh

so when u perish u go again
bro is giga flexing on u with that dragonfire shield
